input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.8.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.8.1.2
            TITLE: dnf - did not finish – the team attempted a run, but did not complete it, or was not allowed

            CONTENT:
            rule D.8.1.2: DNF - Did Not Finish – The team attempted a run, but did not complete it, or was not allowed
D.8.1.2 DNF - Did Not Finish – The team attempted a run, but did not complete it, or was not allowed 
to complete it

final_answer: DNF - Did Not Finish – The team attempted a run, but did not complete it, or was not allowed to complete it
